author: Vaillant Samuel
subject: v5.4.0-beta.1
body:
# [5.4.0-beta.1](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/compare/v5.4.0-beta.0...v5.4.0-beta.1) (2019-01-10)

### Bug Fixes

* **deps:** sync algoliasearch version ([algolia/react-instantsearch#1879](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/1879)) ([3e5d3dc](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/3e5d3dc))
* **maps:** use stable version for peer deps ([algolia/react-instantsearch#1887](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/1887)) ([42fdfba](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/42fdfba))
